entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0013 (54) awarded to NELNET SERVICING, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: "CRITICAL FUNCTION" - THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE THE DEFAULT CALCULATION PERFORMANCE METRIC LANGUAGE AS PROVIDED IN ATTACHMENT A-4 OF THE CONTRACT. THESE METRICS ARE UTILIZED TO EVALUATE THE PERFORMANCE OF FEDERAL STUDENT LOAN SERVICERS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0013 (55) awarded to NELNET SERVICING, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: "CRITICAL FUNCTION". THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR THE DEFAULT AVERSION PILOT PROGRAM. THE NEW PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE WILL BE FROM JANUARY 1, 2012 THROUGH DECEMBER 31, 2013.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0013 (56) awarded to NELNET SERVICING, LLC, was modified for the amount of -$2,527,772.53

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: "CRITICAL FUNCTION" - THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO DE-OBLIGATE EXCESS DEVELOPMENT AND SPECIAL DIRECT CONSOLIDATION LOAN PROGRAM FUNDS FOR FEDERAL STUDENT LOAN SERVICING.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0013 (57) awarded to NELNET SERVICING, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID.
TAS CODE: TAS::91 0198::TAS TO PROVIDE TITLE IV STUDENT LOAN MANAGEMENT AND SERVICING TO SECONDARY EDUCATION STUDENTS. SPECIFIC COMPLIANCE ACTIVITIES FOR SERVICING FEDERALLY HELD ASSETS MAY INCLUDE, BUT ARE NOT LIMITED TO: (1) SECURITY; (2) LOAN CONVERSION, (3) FINANCIAL RECONCILIATION; (4) SERVICING; (5) REPORTING; (6) RECORD RETENTION; AND (7) AUDIT RESPONSE SUPPORT.
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REPLACE THE REQUIREMENTS FOR THE TOTAL AND PERMANENT DISABILITY (TPD) SERVICES AND TO INCORPORATE THE NEW TPD PRICING STRUCTURE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0013 (58) awarded to NELNET SERVICING, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
ESTABLISHES A CONTRACT TERM THAT MEMORIALIZES A PROCEDURE FOR ISSUING A SUMMARY MODIFICATION FOR CHANGE REQUESTS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0013 (59) awarded to NELNET SERVICING, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE CONTRACT: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID. TAS CODE: TAS::91 0198::TAS TO PROVIDE TITLE IV STUDENT LOAN MANAGEMENT AND SERVICING TO SECONDARY EDUCATION STUDENTS. SPECIFIC COMPLIANCE ACTIVITIES FOR SERVICING FEDERALLY HELD ASSETS MAY INCLUDE, BUT ARE NOT LIMITED TO: (1) SECURITY; (2) LOAN CONVERSION, (3) FINANCIAL RECONCILIATION; (4) SERVICING; (5) REPORTING; (6) RECORD RETENTION; AND (7) AUDIT RESPONSE SUPPORT.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE THE REQUIREMENTS AND PRICING SCHEDULE FOR PAYMENT SUPPORT SERVICES INTO THE IDIQ CONTRACT, INCLUDING THE 5-YEAR OPTION PERIOD.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION.
BASE CONTRACT: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID. TAS CODE: TAS::91 0198::TAS TO PROVIDE TITLE IV STUDENT LOAN MANAGEMENT AND SERVICING TO SECONDARY EDUCATION STUDENTS. SPECIFIC COMPLIANCE ACTIVITIES FOR SERVICING FEDERALLY HELD ASSETS MAY INCLUDE, BUT ARE NOT LIMITED TO: (1) SECURITY; (2) LOAN CONVERSION, (3) FINANCIAL RECONCILIATION; (4) SERVICING; (5) REPORTING; (6) RECORD RETENTION; AND (7) AUDIT RESPONSE SUPPORT.
MODIFICATION: TO INCORPORATE THE REQUIREMENTS AND COMMON PRICING STRUCTURE FOR LOAN CONSOLIDATION SERVICES INTO THE BASE CONTRACT, INCLUDING THE 5-YEAR OPTION PERIOD.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION
